meaning: adj.异国情调的,外来的,奇异的
examples: Exotic pets are the in thing right now.
She has a partiality for exotic flowers.
I was beguiled by the romance and exotic atmosphere of the souks in Marrakech.
Along with exotic clothes and loud music, a new word had crossed the Atlantic - teenager.
For those who complain that Bangkok has lost its exotic flavour, Chinatown is the answer.
